---
title: "Melillo et al. Exploratory Data Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
env = read.csv("~/Downloads/EnvDS Project/Data/Melillo/hf199-01-hf-env.csv")
plantID = read.csv("~/Downloads/EnvDS Project/Data/Melillo/hf199-02-hf-plant-ID.csv")
growth = read.csv("~/Downloads/EnvDS Project/Data/Melillo/hf199-03-hf-growth.csv")
```

# Tidying data
(descriptive variable names, coercing data types, etc)

```{r}
env = env %>% 
  rename(c(light_treat = treatment, 
           warm_treat = warming, 
           air_temp = AT, 
           ps_act_rad = Q, 
           rel_humid = Rh, 
           water_content = SM, 
           soil_temp_5cm = ST)) %>% 
  mutate(date = as.Date(paste(year, month, day, sep = "-")),
        chamber = as.factor(chamber),
        light_treat = as.factor(light_treat),
        warm_treat = ordered(warm_treat, levels = c('C', 'A', '3', '5')))

plantID = plantID %>% 
  mutate(light_treat = as.factor(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -5)), 
         num_cham = as.factor(
           paste(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -4), 
                 str_split_i(Chamber, "", -3), sep = "")),
         warm_treat = ordered(as.factor(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -1)), 
                              levels = c('C', 'A', '3', '5')),
         Site = as.factor(Site),
         Species = as.factor(Species),
         Chamber = as.factor(Chamber),
         GermDate = as.Date(GermDate),
         SpringSeeder = as.Date(SpringSeeder),
         CensInDate = as.Date(CensInDate),
         DatePlanted = as.Date(DatePlanted),
         DeathDate = as.Date(DeathDate),
         CensorDate = as.Date(CensorDate),
         MIA = as.Date(MIA)
  )
        

growth = growth %>% 
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date),
         Species = as.factor(Species),
         Tag = sprintf(Tag, fmt = '%.1f'),
         Chamber = as.factor(Chamber),
         light_treat = as.factor(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -5)), 
         num_cham = as.factor(
           paste(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -4), 
                 str_split_i(Chamber, "", -3), sep = "")),
         warm_treat = ordered(as.factor(str_split_i(Chamber, "", -1)), 
                              levels = c('C', 'A', '3', '5')),
         SpringPhen = as.factor(SpringPhen),
         FallPhen = as.factor(FallPhen), 
         WaterStress = as.ordered(WaterStress))
```


# Exploratory Visualizations
Let's make some fuckin CHARTS

### Height vs. Temp
```{r}
# Avg height of each plant species per warmth treatment
growth %>% 
  group_by(Species, warm_treat) %>% 
  summarize(meanHt = mean(Height, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = warm_treat, y = meanHt, fill = warm_treat)) + 
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    labs(title = "Average Tree Height Under Different Warming Treatments",
         subtitle = "Controlled experiment on native species in Harvard Forest from 2009-2013",
         x = "Warming Treatment",
         y = "Mean Height (cm)") +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 45, 90)) +
    facet_wrap(vars(Species)) +
    theme_bw()
```

### Lifespan vs. Temp
```{r}
# Avg lifespan of each species per warming treatment
plantID = plantID %>% 
  mutate(Lifespan = DeathDate - DatePlanted)

plantID %>% 
  group_by(Species, warm_treat) %>% 
  summarize(meanLife = mean(Lifespan, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = warm_treat, y = meanLife, fill = warm_treat)) + 
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    labs(title = "Average Tree Lifespan Under Different Warming Treatments",
         subtitle = "Controlled experiment on native species in Harvard Forest from 2009-2013",
         x = "Warming Treatment",
         y = "Mean Lifespan (Days)") +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 400, 800)) +
    facet_wrap(vars(Species)) +
    theme_bw()
```

### Water Stress vs. Temp
```{r}
env = env %>% 
  rename(num_cham = chamber, Date = date) %>% 
  mutate(num_cham = sprintf("%02d",num_cham),
    Chamber = paste(light_treat, num_cham, "_", warm_treat, sep = ""))

joined = left_join(growth, env, 
                   by = c("Chamber", "Date", "light_treat", "num_cham", "warm_treat"))

joined %>% 
  slice_sample(n = 5000) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = soil_temp_5cm, y = air_temp, color = WaterStress)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.8) +
    theme_bw()
```



```{r}
growth %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = )) +
  geom_scatter() +
```
